blended.narrative: Eldora is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. Strong winds with gusts to 44 mph may cause lift holds. Mild temps with highs near 41°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: clear skies, highs of 41°F, gusts to 44 mph.
Tomorrow: clear skies, highs of 44°F, gusts to 45 mph.
Sunday: 3.3" of snow, highs of 40°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 3.6" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is building — up 10" over the past week. Current depth: 35".
